signals.headline: South Korea Holds Benchmark Interest Rate at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea Holds Benchmark Interest Rate at 2.5% Amid Inflation Pressures from Oil Prices and Iran Conflict | NO | HIGH confidence**[4][5]

South Korea's Bank of Korea (BOK) confirmed on April 10, 2026, that it is maintaining its policy rate at 2.5% for the seventh consecutive month, citing surging oil costs pushing consumer prices above the 2% target (recently at 2.2%) and growth risks below 2%

signals.headline: # HEADLINE: Bitcoin Surges Past $74,000, Triggering 5-6% Rally in Solana and Broader Crypto Market | YES | HIGH confiden
signals.raw: # HEADLINE: Bitcoin Surges Past $74,000, Triggering 5-6% Rally in Solana and Broader Crypto Market | YES | HIGH confidence

signals.headline: Bitcoin broke above $74,000** following positive geopolitical developments, with Iran signaling willingness to resume pe
signals.raw: Bitcoin broke above $74,000** following positive geopolitical developments, with Iran signaling willingness to resume peace talks with the United States[3]. This catalyst triggered a cascade of gains across major cryptocurrencies[3].

signals.headline: Solana surged 5-6% to above $85-$86**, riding the Bitcoin momentum[1][3]
signals.raw: Solana surged 5-6% to above $85-$86**, riding the Bitcoin momentum[1][3]. SOL broke above a key bearish trend line at $83.60 on the hourly chart[1], with daily trading volume jumping 31% to $5.11 billion[1]. The move positions SOL above the 100-hourly simple moving average[1].

signals.headline: Key technical levels for prediction markets:**
signals.raw: Key technical levels for prediction markets:**

signals.headline: **Immediate resistance:** $95-$100 range if the rally continues with Bitcoin holding above $75,000[3]
signals.raw: **Immediate resistance:** $95-$100 range if the rally continues with Bitcoin holding above $75,000[3]

signals.headline: **Support zone:** $75-$80; a pullback below $80 would suggest this is a relief bounce rather than sustained strength[3]
signals.raw: **Support zone:** $75-$80; a pullback below $80 would suggest this is a relief bounce rather than sustained strength[3]

signals.headline: Network fundamentals supporting the move:**
signals.raw:
Network fundamentals supporting the move:**
Solana achieved record metrics that bolster bullish sentiment: 167 million monthly token holders, 148 million daily non-vote transactions[2], and the anticipated Alpenglow consensus upgrade targeting 150-millisecond transaction finality[2]. Institutional ETF inflows from BlackRock and Fidelity remain robust despite market consolidation[2].

signals.headline: Near-term headwinds to monitor:** The rally faces three tests over the next two weeks—the April 15 tax deadline ($2
signals.raw: Near-term headwinds to monitor:** The rally faces three tests over the next two weeks—the April 15 tax deadline ($2.8 billion estimated crypto selling), ceasefire expiry on April 22, and the FOMC meeting on April 28-29[3].
